title: Unit tests for lib/args.mjs
goal: Create tests/args.test.mjs containing thorough node:test unit tests for parseArgs, normalizeArgv and splitRawArgumentString exported from plugins/codex/scripts/lib/args.mjs. Mirror the style of the existing test files in tests/ (import test from "node:test", import assert from "node:assert/strict", relative ESM imports). Cover at minimum: value options (--key value and --key=value), boolean options (--flag and --flag=false), alias mapping, short flags (-k value), positionals, `--` passthrough, the missing-value error, normalizeArgv single-token splitting, and splitRawArgumentString quoting/escaping behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/args.test.mjs exists and only tests plugins/codex/scripts/lib/args.mjs
node --test tests/args.test.mjs passes with every test green
coverage includes value/boolean/short options, aliases, positionals, -- passthrough, missing-value error, and splitRawArgumentString quoting
